changelog: v1.5.32: Auto-updater kills running app before install, 2s exit delay, temp cleanup
changes: v1.5.33: Phase 2.5 — LibreHardwareMonitor integration (auto-install, Eve prompt, sensor status dot)
FIX: Installer kills running KAM Sentinel processes before overwriting the exe
FIX: /api/update/install waits 2s before os._exit(0) so installer fully starts
FIX: Installer purges PyInstaller _MEI temp folders after install completes
